description: Platform billing — plans, Stripe subscriptions, invoices, usage metering.

routes.GET /v1/plans: List public plans (Stripe Price IDs from env)
routes.POST /v1/checkout/sessions/:sessionId/sy: Sync paid session to subscription + Core (INTERNAL_API_KEY, idempotent)

migration: Move Stripe env from Core Back → dakinis-billing Railway; point Stripe webhook to /billing/v1/webhooks/stripe
